caption: A person holds a white certificate with gold trim and black text that reads "CONGRATULATIONS," "You have just received an Oversized Cut Signature Box Topper of Kirby Puckett Minnesota Twins - Outfielder from 2021 Topps Transcendent Collection - Hall of Fame Edition." The certificate further states, "TOPPS CERTIFIES THE AUTHENTICITY OF THE CUT SIGNATURE FOUND IN THIS CARD." The scene is viewed through a screen, which displays a "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" logo in the top right and a smaller "JASPYS" logo in the bottom right. A man wearing a purple shirt sits in a home office environment with a desk and computer equipment visible in the background, appearing in a picture-in-picture window on the right side of the screen. Across the sequence of frames, the hand holding the certificate shifts slightly, and the man in the window maintains a steady posture, looking toward the camera.
